general.description: General dental reference materials and textbooks covering multiple specialties

documents.title: Endodontics: Principles and Practice
documents.subject: endodontics
documents.description: Comprehensive endodontics textbook covering all aspects of root canal therapy and pulp biology. This is the primary reference for all endodontic procedures, diagnosis, and treatment planning.
covers: Working length determination (electronic apex locators, radiographic methods)
Root canal instrumentation techniques (step-back, crown-down, hybrid)
Root canal irrigation and disinfection (NaOCl, EDTA, CHX, activated irrigation)
Obturation techniques (lateral condensation, vertical condensation, thermoplasticized gutta-percha)
Single visit vs multiple visit endodontics
Management of open apex (apexification, apexogenesis, revascularization)
Vital pulp therapy (direct/indirect pulp capping, pulpotomy)
